title: Cwtch 16x [BUBBLEGUM]
description: A texture pack made by me, Jocoed
body:
### **A texture pack made for my other welshmen consisting of textures i've made and some from my favorite bedwars packs.**

  This pack contains
- Clean armour textures
- Sheep themed apples
- Totem texture updated
- Low fire
- Custom guis
- Short swords
- Updated wool textures
- No pumpkin blur
- New enchantment glint
- And way way more

Any suggestions / problems add my discord : Jocoed
